codeReview.summary: Feature implementation is complete and correct. All 21 tests pass. The 5-category failure taxonomy (ImplementationBug, TestBug, EnvironmentIssue, Flaky, Unclear) is properly implemented with confidence scoring and action recommendations per category.

issues.description: Score overflow potential: The file location multiplier (1.2) can push category scores above 1.0 (e.g., 0.95 * 1.2 = 1.14). While confidence is correctly clamped to 0.95 in ClassificationResult::new(), the intermediate score variable exceeds 1.0 which is semantically inconsistent. Consider clamping scores before comparison or using a different normalization approach.

summary: PASS - Feature val-result-interpreter fully implemented with 5-category failure taxonomy (ImplementationBug, TestBug, EnvironmentIssue, Flaky, Unclear), confidence scoring per classification, and action recommendations per category. 21 unit tests pass covering all categories, confidence bounds, batch classification, and historical flakiness detection. One minor non-blocking design issue: scores can exceed 1.0 before being clamped to confidence. No blocking issues found.
